posts.cookedHtml:
Formula for finding Avg time “00:00:00”

I have a number column for amount for calls

and a text column for duration of time.

I’m trying to find a way to make a formula tell me the avg call time. the format in the text column is “00:00:00”

posts.cookedHtml: Bumping this so it shows at top.
